channel.title: Performance Evaluation on QA & University Performance Department
channel.description: Recent content in Performance Evaluation on QA & University Performance Department

item.title: Guidance Manual
item.description:
Institutional Performance-Evaluation Guidance Manual

The guidance manual serves as a reference document for colleges and centers when completing the institutional performance-evaluation forms. It aims to standardize concepts and ensure the quality of data submitted.

Manual Contents

Chapter One: Introduction

  • Overview of the institutional performance-evaluation system
  • General objectives
  • Bodies responsible for implementation

Chapter Two: Concepts and Terminology

  • Definitions of the principal indicators
  • Units of measurement
  • Methodology for calculating ratios

Chapter Three: Completion Instructions

  • Steps for completing the form
  • Required evidence and documentation
  • Deadlines

Chapter Four: Verification and Audit

  • Internal review mechanism
  • External audit
  • Feedback loops

Annexes

  • Form templates
  • Checklists
  • Worked examples
  • Indicator tables

To obtain a copy of the manual: contact the department at: qu.assurance@qu.edu.iq

item.title: Institutional Evaluation Forms 2023-2024
item.description:
Forms for the 2023-2024 Academic Year

Archive of the institutional performance-evaluation forms applied at Al-Qadisiyah University during the 2023-2024 academic year.

Evaluation Pillars

Academic Pillar

  • Academic programmes and their updating
  • Learning outcomes and their assessment
  • Teaching and assessment methods
  • Faculty research output

Administrative Pillar

  • Organizational structure
  • Human-resources management
  • Financial resources
  • Administrative organization

Student Pillar

  • Student services
  • Extracurricular activities
  • Academic advising
  • Programme graduates

Infrastructure Pillar

  • Lecture halls
  • Laboratories
  • Libraries
  • Technology and e-systems

Note: The annual report covering the 2023-2024 evaluation outcomes has been issued and is available to authorized university bodies.

item.title: Institutional Evaluation Forms 2024-2025
item.description:
Forms for the 2024-2025 Academic Year

The 2024-2025 institutional performance-evaluation framework comprises an integrated set of forms directed at colleges, centers, and administrative departments.

Form Types

College Performance Form

Covering:

  • Academic programmes and learning outcomes
  • Faculty and staff
  • Students and student services
  • Research and creative activity
  • Infrastructure and laboratories
  • Community service and partnerships
  • Internal quality assurance

Research-Centre Performance Form

Covering:

  • Research output
  • Laboratories and equipment
  • External collaboration
  • Patents and innovation

Administrative-Department Performance Form

Covering:

item.title: Surveys
item.description:
Surveys

The department designs and administers a range of surveys directed at the various beneficiaries of university services, in order to measure satisfaction and gather feedback for performance improvement.

Principal Surveys

Faculty Evaluation Survey (Students)

Administered at the end of each semester to measure student satisfaction with teaching-staff performance; results feed into teaching-performance evaluation and professional-development plans.

Programme Satisfaction Survey (Students)

Measures students’ satisfaction with academic programmes in terms of content, teaching and assessment methods, and available resources.
